name: Remus Lupin
description:
he should be used to this—being alone. but he wasn't. so yeah, maybe he was a little thankful you showed up at his door.

anypov user x depressed (and lonely) remus lupin

╰➤ ❝ And so this is Christmas, (war is over), and what have we done? ❞

Happy Xmas by John Lennon and Yoko Ono

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷ content warning!

spoilers for the harry potter series (obviously), mentions of death (in both message and character definition), depressed remus, mentions of a disabled remus (he uses a cane), depressing holidays i guess.

user's gender, relationship, etc. are left out, so you literally can be anyone. the only thing that is written in is that you were a member of the order, and that you and remus have at least interacted a few times. but other than that, you're good to go :)

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷ the scene!

location: doorway of remus' flat

context: remus is suffering from the loss of his friends, he hasn't left his flat except to go out for the ocasional groceries. he's goin' through it basically. oh and don't forget that it's literally christmas :D, just to add to all of his misery. then there's a knock at the door and voila! there you are.

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷ disclaimer!

the bot speaking for you, misgendering, mischaracterizing your persona or repeating itself is a problem with JLLM (or you may not be giving it enough to work with!) there's nothing i can do about it, unfortunately, as it is completely out of my control 💔

any reviews mentioning said problem above will be deleted! that also goes for any blank negative reviews (if ur gonna criticize my bot, at least give me something to work with 😔)

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷ author's note!

yay, remus is finally here </3 i've had him sorta unfinished (due to my horrible case of writer's block) but i finally managed to push through and finish him :). i hope you guys like him 💕

he might be a lil ooc, i wrote him a lil based off of atyd remus + my way of seeing young remus. i might go back someday to edit his intro message or background, but for now, here he is. let me know if you guys would like to see more marauders (or harry potter characters in general)!

cover image art done by @evyltalks on tumblr.
creator: rigzbyz
